title: Deep Learning for Image Recognition
abstract: This paper explores convolutional neural networks for image classification tasks.

title: Transformer Models in Natural Language Processing
abstract: We discuss the application of transformer architectures in natural language processing tasks such as translation and summarization.

title: Graph Neural Networks: A Survey
abstract: A comprehensive review of graph neural networks and their applications in structured data.

title: Sentiment Analysis Using Deep Learning
abstract: This work studies sentiment analysis techniques using recurrent and convolutional neural networks.

title: Financial Text Analysis with Machine Learning
abstract: We analyze financial news articles using machine learning methods for market prediction.

title: Transformer-Based Models for Text Classification
abstract: Transformer-based architectures are evaluated for multiple text classification benchmarks.

title: Multimodal Learning with Vision and Language
abstract: We propose models that jointly learn from visual and textual data.

title: Machine Learning in Quantitative Finance
abstract: An overview of machine learning techniques applied to quantitative finance problems.

title: Graph-Based Fraud Detection
abstract: Graph-based machine learning methods are used to detect fraudulent financial transactions.

title: Recent Trends in Large Language Models
abstract: This paper reviews recent advances in large language models and their capabilities.
